subcodes.first_line: O Qhulam Qabl-'Alí! Time and again hath thy mention descended from the heaven of loving-kindness, and thy name hath been recorded by the Most Exalted Pen in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل علی مکرر ذکرت از سماء عنایت نازل و اسمت در کتاب از قلم اعلی مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
